applyTo: "docs/tickets/**/*.md"
issueNum: "GitHub Issue Number"

# <short_title>

## Description

> What is the change? Why is it needed?

## Requirements

> Document WHAT is needed and WHY it is needed.

- [ ] Requirement 1
- [ ] Requirement 2

## Designs & Constraints

> Any non-obvious designs or constraints to the design that MUST be followed.

- [ ] Design 1
- [ ] Design 2

## Acceptance Criteria

> Document the criteria that must be met for the ticket to be considered complete.

- [ ] Acceptance Criteria 1
- [ ] Acceptance Criteria 2

## Notes

> Any additional context, risks, or considerations.


## LLM Plan

> LLM's can use this section to document their planning before implementation.
